display.purpose: Page title. One instance per dashboard view.

headline.purpose: Primary financial figures: balance, income, expenses in stat cards.

body.purpose: Transaction titles, form input values, prose descriptions.

label.purpose: Form labels, helper text, metadata, category tags, chart axis labels.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Floating elements only: dropdowns, tooltips, popovers. Never applied to surfaces at rest.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Interactive feedback: hover, focus, button press.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width submit action. Used at the bottom of forms as the single CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: block; width: 100%; background: #4f46e5; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338ca; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #e0e7ff; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Danger Button
components.description: Inline destructive action. Quiet at rest, loud on hover. Used for delete actions in transaction rows.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost-danger { background: transparent; color: #64748b; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost-danger:hover { background: #fff1f2; color: #e11d48; } .ds-btn-ghost-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field with persistent label above. Used for transaction title, amount, and date.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #334155; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #020617; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; outline: none; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #e0e7ff; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary container for dashboard sections. Flat surface with structural border, no shadow.
components.html:
Recent transactions

Your latest entries.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card-heading { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #020617; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; } .ds-card-subtext { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #64748b; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Transaction Row
components.description: Signature component. Displays a single transaction with title, metadata, signed amount, and delete action. Text-first, no icons.
components.html:
Groceries

Food · 2026-06-03 · variable

-$42.50
components.css: .ds-transaction-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; } .ds-transaction-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; } .ds-transaction-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: #020617; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-transaction-meta { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #64748b; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; } .ds-transaction-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-transaction-amount { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-amount-positive { color: #059669; } .ds-amount-negative { color: #e11d48; } .ds-row-delete { background: transparent; color: #64748b; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-row-delete:hover { background: #fff1f2; color: #e11d48; } .ds-row-delete:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dashboard Stat Card
components.description: Signature component. Displays a single financial metric. The value is the visual anchor.
components.html:
Balance

$1,240.00

Income minus expenses
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #020617; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 8px 0 0; } .ds-stat-helper { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #64748b; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 8px 0 0; }

components.name: Error Banner
components.description: Full-width error state for API failures and validation errors.
components.html: Could not connect to the MoneyMapper API.
components.css: .ds-error-banner { background: #fff1f2; border: 1px solid #fecdd3; border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #be123c; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview:
MoneyMapper is a tool for one person who knows their data. The interface's job is to stay out of the way while making numbers immediately readable. Nothing celebrates, nothing encourages, nothing softens. It is a quiet surface for clear thinking.

This system rejects four failure modes by name: the consumer-finance softness of Mint and YNAB (pastel palettes, rounded-everything, hand-holding copy); the inflated hype of Robinhood (green gradients, gamified tracking); the generic SaaS dashboard template (cool-gray background, white cards with gray borders, indigo accent on everything); and banking-app sterility (corporate, institutional, zero craft). What remains is a precise, capable instrument that treats its user as a competent adult.

Color is restrained: one accent for actions, semantic green and red for financial meaning, neutral grays for everything else. Elevation is structural: flat surfaces defined by borders, not shadows. Motion is limited to state feedback at 150-250ms. The system font carries all hierarchy.
keyCharacteristics: Structural borders define containers; shadows appear only on floating elements
Semantic color for financial meaning only (green = income, red = expense, never decorative)
System font stack throughout; legibility over typographic personality
Data density is a feature, not a problem to manage with progressive disclosure
One accent color, on less than 10% of any screen at a time

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Focused Indigo (#4f46e5) appears on a maximum of 10% of any screen. Reserved for primary CTA, active input borders, and focus rings. Never on decorative elements, section headings, background fills, or chart series.

rules.name: The Semantic Pledge
rules.body: Signal Green means income. Deficit Red means expense or error. These two colors are never repurposed for other semantic roles.

rules.name: The Number Priority Rule
rules.body: Financial amounts always render at 700 weight minimum. The amount is primary; the label names it.

rules.name: The One Scale Rule
rules.body: Five steps, nothing outside them: display, headline, title, body, label. No ad-hoc sizes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface carries a shadow at rest. The Float shadow is for floating elements only: dropdowns, tooltips, popovers.

dos: Do use Signal Green (#059669) and Deficit Red (#e11d48) exclusively for financial values. Their consistency is the system.
Do use Focused Indigo on a maximum of one prominent interactive element per viewport.
Do keep form labels as persistent text above the field at Label Gray (#334155, 500 weight, 14px).
Do use 12px radius for inputs and inline elements; 16px radius for cards and containers.
Do add a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for every framer-motion animation.
Do render financial figures at 700 weight. The number is the product.
Do use Structure Line (#e2e8f0) as the single border token across all inputs and containers.
donts: Don't replicate the generic SaaS dashboard template: no cream backgrounds, no shadow-sm on every card, no Focused Indigo on decorative elements.
Don't introduce Mint/YNAB consumer-finance softness: no pastels, no encouraging microcopy, no rounded-3xl+ corners.
Don't introduce Robinhood-style hype: no gradient fills on positive amounts, no gamified progress bars.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill). Solid color only.
Don't add a border-left wider than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or list items.
Don't apply shadows to surfaces at rest.
Don't use Focused Indigo on headings, dividers, or background fills.
Don't use the eyebrow pattern (small all-caps tracked labels above every section heading).
